→ plot:

Growing up a devout catholic christian in a patriarchal and abusive religious family, Samuel has been repressed and punished all-throughout his childhood, growing to become a god-fearing and self-destructive man, ultimately killing his father after being pushed too hard. Covering up his murder as a suicide, Samuel has forever lived in guilt, shame, and fear of his father’s memory.

Looking to be “forgiven”, he became a frequent church-goer, started dedicating his life to religion and becoming the normal, traditional American man as his family dreamed of him being. But all he’s missing is a submissive wife, and a few kids. But it’s alright, because that’s where you come in.

→ A/N:

i want to preface this by saying that this is in NO WAY meant to be a dig at religion or anything! and i have no qualms against religion at all, and of course, everyone’s religion is not majorly like samuel’s experiences.

i was raised christian as a child while living with my grandpa but since i’ve moved away i’ve mostly forgotten how most things work, and i’ve tried my best to recall and research anything related to religion with this bot. sorry if anything may be wrong! 😭

sammy is apart of yet another (unfinished) follower celebration series 😭 ive added him as apart of kinktober along w/ other bots. user is implied to not be religious, though ultimately its up to you. fem pronouns briefly used in the intro, though not to refer to user. keep in mind hes all about feminization! so he may refer to user with feminine terms.

inspo for him was ethel cain. and nicole dollanganger. but also other songs. short track list… do you guys see the vision
